sqlMap.insert: insert into FirmLW(PolicyKey ContactPerson ContactPhone IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns IsPolicyExcludesCoverage LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp IsQuickQuoteByEmail IsAnAgentCall ContactPhoneExt IsBasicPage IsGeneralPage IsEntertainmentPage IsClientTerminated FirstReviewUserID LicenseNumber IsQuotePage YearOfFirmEstablished IsFirmPracticeInOtherState IsFirmHaveClientInEntertainmentInd IsFirmInvolvedInClassActionCase IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToSecurity IsFirmHaveClientMoreThan25PercentOfBilling PercentFromFirstLargestRevenueClient PercentFromSecondLargestRevenueClient ServicesRenderedFirstLargestRevenueClient ServicesRenderedSecondLargestRevenueClient IsFirmHaveLawyersLiabilityInsurance PolicyExcludeCoverageForAffiliatesDesc IsFirmCoverageForPreceedorFirms IsFirmHaveEquityIntGrtThan10 IsFirmPersServedAsOfficerInJointVenture IsApplicantProvidesLegalServices ApplicantProvidesLegalServicesDesc IsAttorneyNotCoveredByProfLiability IsAppOfficeSharedWithAttorney TotalNumOfNonAttorneyStaff IsFirmHaveIndepDockets IsFirmRequireEngagementLetter IsNonEngagementLetterIssueToFirm IsPolicyProhibitAttorneyWithInvestment IsEmplRelativeToConfInfomation PercentofApplAcctRcbl IsApplInitiatedLawsuitForFirm IsAttorneyDeclineForProfLiability AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityDates AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityReasons IsIndependentContractor IsFirmHaveBackupAttorney PerOfGrossBillingsUnderContract BackupAttorneyName BackupAttorneyAddress BackupAttorneyPhoneNumber IsFirmHaveProcForFormersClients IsLawyerProfLiabClaimAgntAppl IsPersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvest IsAnyActOmmBecomeClaimAgntFirm ApplicantName IsApplRestWithManagement ApplRestWithManagementDesc PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDate PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDetails IsTaxPage IsEnvironmentalPage IsSecuritiesPage IsTitlePage IsWillsEstatePage IsPlaintiffPage IsRealEstatePage IsFinancialInsPage IsIntellectPropPage IsCorporatePage IsFirmMergedWithOtherFirm IsAopPage IsPracticePage IsFirmPage IsCoveragePage IsApplIntToFinanAssests IsPolicyIncludeLateralHireCov IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToInvestment IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToMoney IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToInvClient BackupAttorneyAddress2 CommentsByInsured CommentsByAgent IsLoginMailSent IsMailSent IsRegistrationPage IsRetreivalMailSent IsQuickQuotePage IsClaimInLastFiveYears IsReceiveNewsLetter IsFirmReferred QuoteEffectiveDate QuoteExpiryDate Comment ModifierComment CreatedBy IsQuoteViewedByInsured AcceptanceDate QuoteSentDate IsTaxCalculation IsViewed QuoteComment IsQuickQuoteMailSent IsLicenseNumberUpdated IssuedDate IsRealEstateResidentialPage IsRealEstateCommercialPage IsApplFirmWithDifferentLegalName ApplLegalNameAddressDesc IsFirmEquityInterestInTitleInsurance MarketingId IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceDesc IsAttorneyAddedDeleted IsFirmProvidedLegalService IsRenewFirmPage IsFirmProvideInvestmentAdvice ClientNameFirstLargestRevenueClient Is9010Policy IsSpecialIssuance GrossFeesPaidRenew DateRenderedFirstLargestRevenueClient ClientNameSecondLargestRevenueClient IsRenewalReview SpecialIssuanceComments ipfsQuoteNumber RenewalReviewComments DateRenderedSecondLargestRevenueClient IsOffRiskLetterUploaded isPricingApproved isComingFromUWFlow UnderwriterComment FollowUnderwriterFlow ReferralCountHistory NumberOfLawyers NumberOfLawyers500 NumberOfLawyers1000 IsIndicationPage IsFormDocumentSigned SubProducerComment IsThankYouEmailSend QQRMLink isFirmCoverageForPreceedorFirmsDescription FirmInvestmentAdviceDesc isServedAsCEOChairmanPresident isPolicyExcludeCoverageDescription isPolicyExcludeCoverage disbursementTransaction peopleToDisburseFunds instructionsDocumentedReceivingParty doucumentedProtocolsAndAuthority IsIndicationMailSent IsCantSeeQuote IsAOPChange ZohoAccountID VersionKey isNewApp hasAnyFirmPersonnelReported ) values (#PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #ContactPerson# #ContactPhone# #IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns# #IsPolicyExcludesCoverage# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #IsQuickQuoteByEmail# #IsAnAgentCall# #ContactPhoneExt# #IsBasicPage# #IsGeneralPage# #IsEntertainmentPage# #IsClientTerminated# #FirstReviewUserID# #LicenseNumber# #IsQuotePage# #YearOfFirmEstablished# #IsFirmPracticeInOtherState# #IsFirmHaveClientInEntertainmentInd# #IsFirmInvolvedInClassActionCase# #IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToSecurity# #IsFirmHaveClientMoreThan25PercentOfBilling# #PercentFromFirstLargestRevenueClient# #PercentFromSecondLargestRevenueClient# #ServicesRenderedFirstLargestRevenueClient# #ServicesRenderedSecondLargestRevenueClient# #IsFirmHaveLawyersLiabilityInsurance# #PolicyExcludeCoverageForAffiliatesDesc# #IsFirmCoverageForPreceedorFirms# #IsFirmHaveEquityIntGrtThan10# #IsFirmPersServedAsOfficerInJointVenture# #IsApplicantProvidesLegalServices# #ApplicantProvidesLegalServicesDesc# #IsAttorneyNotCoveredByProfLiability# #IsAppOfficeSharedWithAttorney# #TotalNumOfNonAttorneyStaff# #IsFirmHaveIndepDockets# #IsFirmRequireEngagementLetter# #IsNonEngagementLetterIssueToFirm# #IsPolicyProhibitAttorneyWithInvestment# #IsEmplRelativeToConfInfomation# #PercentofApplAcctRcbl# #IsApplInitiatedLawsuitForFirm# #IsAttorneyDeclineForProfLiability# #AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityDates# #AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityReasons# #IsIndependentContractor# #IsFirmHaveBackupAttorney# #PerOfGrossBillingsUnderContract# #BackupAttorneyName# #BackupAttorneyAddress# #BackupAttorneyPhoneNumber# #IsFirmHaveProcForFormersClients# #IsLawyerProfLiabClaimAgntAppl# #IsPersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvest# #IsAnyActOmmBecomeClaimAgntFirm# #ApplicantName# #IsApplRestWithManagement# #ApplRestWithManagementDesc# #PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDate# #PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDetails# #IsTaxPage# #IsEnvironmentalPage# #IsSecuritiesPage# #IsTitlePage# #IsWillsEstatePage# #IsPlaintiffPage# #IsRealEstatePage# #IsFinancialInsPage# #IsIntellectPropPage# #IsCorporatePage# #IsFirmMergedWithOtherFirm# #IsAopPage# #IsPracticePage# #IsFirmPage# #IsCoveragePage# #IsApplIntToFinanAssests# #IsPolicyIncludeLateralHireCov# #IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToInvestment# #IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToMoney# #IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToInvClient# #BackupAttorneyAddress2# #CommentsByInsured# #CommentsByAgent# #IsLoginMailSent# #IsMailSent# #IsRegistrationPage# #IsRetreivalMailSent# #IsQuickQuotePage# #IsClaimInLastFiveYears# #IsReceiveNewsLetter# #IsFirmReferred# #QuoteEffectiveDate# #QuoteExpiryDate# #Comment# #ModifierComment# #CreatedBy# #IsQuoteViewedByInsured# #AcceptanceDate# #QuoteSentDate# #IsTaxCalculation# #IsViewed# #QuoteComment# #IsQuickQuoteMailSent# #IsLicenseNumberUpdated# #IssuedDate# #IsRealEstateResidentialPage# #IsRealEstateCommercialPage# #IsApplFirmWithDifferentLegalName# #ApplLegalNameAddressDesc# #IsFirmEquityInterestInTitleInsurance# #MarketingId# #IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceDesc# #IsAttorneyAddedDeleted# #IsFirmProvidedLegalService# #IsRenewFirmPage# #IsFirmProvideInvestmentAdvice# #ClientNameFirstLargestRevenueClient# #Is9010Policy# #IsSpecialIssuance# #GrossFeesPaidRenew# #DateRenderedFirstLargestRevenueClient# #ClientNameSecondLargestRevenueClient# #IsRenewalReview# #SpecialIssuanceComments# #ipfsQuoteNumber# #RenewalReviewComments# #DateRenderedSecondLargestRevenueClient# #IsOffRiskLetterUploaded# #isPricingApproved# #isComingFromUWFlow# #UnderwriterComment# #FollowUnderwriterFlow# #ReferralCountHistory# #NumberOfLawyers# #NumberOfLawyers500# #NumberOfLawyers1000# #IsIndicationPage# #IsFormDocumentSigned# #SubProducerComment# #IsThankYouEmailSend# #QQRMLink# #isFirmCoverageForPreceedorFirmsDescription# #FirmInvestmentAdviceDesc# #isServedAsCEOChairmanPresident# #isPolicyExcludeCoverageDescription# #isPolicyExcludeCoverage# #disbursementTransaction# #peopleToDisburseFunds# #instructionsDocumentedReceivingParty# #doucumentedProtocolsAndAuthority# #IsIndicationMailSent# #IsCantSeeQuote# #IsAOPChange# #ZohoAccountID# #VersionKey# #isNewApp# #hasAnyFirmPersonnelReported# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('FirmLW') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select ContactPerson, ContactPhone, IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns, IsPolicyExcludesCoverage, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsQuickQuoteByEmail, IsAnAgentCall, ContactPhoneExt, IsBasicPage, IsGeneralPage, IsEntertainmentPage, IsClientTerminated, FirstReviewUserID, VersionSequence, LicenseNumber, IsQuotePage, YearOfFirmEstablished, IsFirmPracticeInOtherState, IsFirmHaveClientInEntertainmentInd, IsFirmInvolvedInClassActionCase, IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToSecurity, IsFirmHaveClientMoreThan25PercentOfBilling, PercentFromFirstLargestRevenueClient, PercentFromSecondLargestRevenueClient, ServicesRenderedFirstLargestRevenueClient, ServicesRenderedSecondLargestRevenueClient, IsFirmHaveLawyersLiabilityInsurance, PolicyExcludeCoverageForAffiliatesDesc, IsFirmCoverageForPreceedorFirms, IsFirmHaveEquityIntGrtThan10, IsFirmPersServedAsOfficerInJointVenture, IsApplicantProvidesLegalServices, ApplicantProvidesLegalServicesDesc, IsAttorneyNotCoveredByProfLiability, IsAppOfficeSharedWithAttorney, TotalNumOfNonAttorneyStaff, IsFirmHaveIndepDockets, IsFirmRequireEngagementLetter, IsNonEngagementLetterIssueToFirm, IsPolicyProhibitAttorneyWithInvestment, IsEmplRelativeToConfInfomation, PercentofApplAcctRcbl, IsApplInitiatedLawsuitForFirm, IsAttorneyDeclineForProfLiability, AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityDates, AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityReasons, IsIndependentContractor, IsFirmHaveBackupAttorney, PerOfGrossBillingsUnderContract, BackupAttorneyName, BackupAttorneyAddress, BackupAttorneyPhoneNumber, IsFirmHaveProcForFormersClients, IsLawyerProfLiabClaimAgntAppl, IsPersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvest, IsAnyActOmmBecomeClaimAgntFirm, ApplicantName, IsApplRestWithManagement, ApplRestWithManagementDesc, PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDate, PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDetails, IsTaxPage, IsEnvironmentalPage, IsSecuritiesPage, IsTitlePage, IsWillsEstatePage, IsPlaintiffPage, IsRealEstatePage, IsFinancialInsPage, IsIntellectPropPage, IsCorporatePage, IsFirmMergedWithOtherFirm, IsAopPage, IsPracticePage, IsFirmPage, IsCoveragePage, IsApplIntToFinanAssests, IsPolicyIncludeLateralHireCov, IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToInvestment, IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToMoney, IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToInvClient, BackupAttorneyAddress2, CommentsByInsured, CommentsByAgent, IsLoginMailSent, IsMailSent, IsRegistrationPage, IsRetreivalMailSent, IsQuickQuotePage, IsClaimInLastFiveYears, IsReceiveNewsLetter, IsFirmReferred, QuoteEffectiveDate, QuoteExpiryDate, Comment, ModifierComment, CreatedBy, IsQuoteViewedByInsured, AcceptanceDate, QuoteSentDate, IsTaxCalculation, IsViewed, QuoteComment, IsQuickQuoteMailSent, IsLicenseNumberUpdated, IssuedDate, IsRealEstateResidentialPage, IsRealEstateCommercialPage, IsApplFirmWithDifferentLegalName, ApplLegalNameAddressDesc, IsFirmEquityInterestInTitleInsurance, MarketingId, IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceDesc, IsAttorneyAddedDeleted, IsFirmProvidedLegalService, IsRenewFirmPage, IsFirmProvideInvestmentAdvice, ClientNameFirstLargestRevenueClient, Is9010Policy, IsSpecialIssuance, GrossFeesPaidRenew, DateRenderedFirstLargestRevenueClient, ClientNameSecondLargestRevenueClient, IsRenewalReview, SpecialIssuanceComments, ipfsQuoteNumber, RenewalReviewComments, DateRenderedSecondLargestRevenueClient, IsOffRiskLetterUploaded, isPricingApproved, isComingFromUWFlow, UnderwriterComment, FollowUnderwriterFlow, ReferralCountHistory, NumberOfLawyers, NumberOfLawyers500, NumberOfLawyers1000, IsIndicationPage, IsFormDocumentSigned, SubProducerComment, IsThankYouEmailSend, QQRMLink, isFirmCoverageForPreceedorFirmsDescription, FirmInvestmentAdviceDesc, isServedAsCEOChairmanPresident, isPolicyExcludeCoverageDescription, isPolicyExcludeCoverage, disbursementTransaction, peopleToDisburseFunds, instructionsDocumentedReceivingParty, doucumentedProtocolsAndAuthority, IsIndicationMailSent, IsCantSeeQuote, IsAOPChange, ZohoAccountID, VersionKey, isNewApp, hasAnyFirmPersonnelReported, PolicyKey from FirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update FirmLW set
ContactPerson = #ContactPerson# ContactPerson = null ContactPhone = #ContactPhone# ContactPhone = null IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns = #IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns# IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns = null IsPolicyExcludesCoverage = #IsPolicyExcludesCoverage# IsPolicyExcludesCoverage = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null IsQuickQuoteByEmail = #IsQuickQuoteByEmail# IsQuickQuoteByEmail = null IsAnAgentCall = #IsAnAgentCall# IsAnAgentCall = null ContactPhoneExt = #ContactPhoneExt# ContactPhoneExt = null IsBasicPage = #IsBasicPage# IsBasicPage = null IsGeneralPage = #IsGeneralPage# IsGeneralPage = null IsEntertainmentPage = #IsEntertainmentPage# IsEntertainmentPage = null IsClientTerminated = #IsClientTerminated# IsClientTerminated = null FirstReviewUserID = #FirstReviewUserID# FirstReviewUserID = null LicenseNumber = #LicenseNumber# LicenseNumber = null IsQuotePage = #IsQuotePage# IsQuotePage = null YearOfFirmEstablished = #YearOfFirmEstablished# YearOfFirmEstablished = null IsFirmPracticeInOtherState = #IsFirmPracticeInOtherState# IsFirmPracticeInOtherState = null IsFirmHaveClientInEntertainmentInd = #IsFirmHaveClientInEntertainmentInd# IsFirmHaveClientInEntertainmentInd = null IsFirmInvolvedInClassActionCase = #IsFirmInvolvedInClassActionCase# IsFirmInvolvedInClassActionCase = null IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToSecurity = #IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToSecurity# IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToSecurity = null IsFirmHaveClientMoreThan25PercentOfBilling = #IsFirmHaveClientMoreThan25PercentOfBilling# IsFirmHaveClientMoreThan25PercentOfBilling = null PercentFromFirstLargestRevenueClient = #PercentFromFirstLargestRevenueClient# PercentFromFirstLargestRevenueClient = null PercentFromSecondLargestRevenueClient = #PercentFromSecondLargestRevenueClient# PercentFromSecondLargestRevenueClient = null ServicesRenderedFirstLargestRevenueClient = #ServicesRenderedFirstLargestRevenueClient# ServicesRenderedFirstLargestRevenueClient = null ServicesRenderedSecondLargestRevenueClient = #ServicesRenderedSecondLargestRevenueClient# ServicesRenderedSecondLargestRevenueClient = null IsFirmHaveLawyersLiabilityInsurance = #IsFirmHaveLawyersLiabilityInsurance# IsFirmHaveLawyersLiabilityInsurance = null PolicyExcludeCoverageForAffiliatesDesc = #PolicyExcludeCoverageForAffiliatesDesc# PolicyExcludeCoverageForAffiliatesDesc = null IsFirmCoverageForPreceedorFirms = #IsFirmCoverageForPreceedorFirms# IsFirmCoverageForPreceedorFirms = null IsFirmHaveEquityIntGrtThan10 = #IsFirmHaveEquityIntGrtThan10# IsFirmHaveEquityIntGrtThan10 = null IsFirmPersServedAsOfficerInJointVenture = #IsFirmPersServedAsOfficerInJointVenture# IsFirmPersServedAsOfficerInJointVenture = null IsApplicantProvidesLegalServices = #IsApplicantProvidesLegalServices# IsApplicantProvidesLegalServices = null ApplicantProvidesLegalServicesDesc = #ApplicantProvidesLegalServicesDesc# ApplicantProvidesLegalServicesDesc = null IsAttorneyNotCoveredByProfLiability = #IsAttorneyNotCoveredByProfLiability# IsAttorneyNotCoveredByProfLiability = null IsAppOfficeSharedWithAttorney = #IsAppOfficeSharedWithAttorney# IsAppOfficeSharedWithAttorney = null TotalNumOfNonAttorneyStaff = #TotalNumOfNonAttorneyStaff# TotalNumOfNonAttorneyStaff = null IsFirmHaveIndepDockets = #IsFirmHaveIndepDockets# IsFirmHaveIndepDockets = null IsFirmRequireEngagementLetter = #IsFirmRequireEngagementLetter# IsFirmRequireEngagementLetter = null IsNonEngagementLetterIssueToFirm = #IsNonEngagementLetterIssueToFirm# IsNonEngagementLetterIssueToFirm = null IsPolicyProhibitAttorneyWithInvestment = #IsPolicyProhibitAttorneyWithInvestment# IsPolicyProhibitAttorneyWithInvestment = null IsEmplRelativeToConfInfomation = #IsEmplRelativeToConfInfomation# IsEmplRelativeToConfInfomation = null PercentofApplAcctRcbl = #PercentofApplAcctRcbl# PercentofApplAcctRcbl = null IsApplInitiatedLawsuitForFirm = #IsApplInitiatedLawsuitForFirm# IsApplInitiatedLawsuitForFirm = null IsAttorneyDeclineForProfLiability = #IsAttorneyDeclineForProfLiability# IsAttorneyDeclineForProfLiability = null AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityDates = #AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityDates# AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityDates = null AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityReasons = #AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityReasons# AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityReasons = null IsIndependentContractor = #IsIndependentContractor# IsIndependentContractor = null IsFirmHaveBackupAttorney = #IsFirmHaveBackupAttorney# IsFirmHaveBackupAttorney = null PerOfGrossBillingsUnderContract = #PerOfGrossBillingsUnderContract# PerOfGrossBillingsUnderContract = null BackupAttorneyName = #BackupAttorneyName# BackupAttorneyName = null BackupAttorneyAddress = #BackupAttorneyAddress# BackupAttorneyAddress = null BackupAttorneyPhoneNumber = #BackupAttorneyPhoneNumber# BackupAttorneyPhoneNumber = null IsFirmHaveProcForFormersClients = #IsFirmHaveProcForFormersClients# IsFirmHaveProcForFormersClients = null IsLawyerProfLiabClaimAgntAppl = #IsLawyerProfLiabClaimAgntAppl# IsLawyerProfLiabClaimAgntAppl = null IsPersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvest = #IsPersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvest# IsPersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvest = null IsAnyActOmmBecomeClaimAgntFirm = #IsAnyActOmmBecomeClaimAgntFirm# IsAnyActOmmBecomeClaimAgntFirm = null ApplicantName = #ApplicantName# ApplicantName = null IsApplRestWithManagement = #IsApplRestWithManagement# IsApplRestWithManagement = null ApplRestWithManagementDesc = #ApplRestWithManagementDesc# ApplRestWithManagementDesc = null PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDate = #PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDate# PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDate = null PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDetails = #PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDetails# PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDetails = null IsTaxPage = #IsTaxPage# IsTaxPage = null IsEnvironmentalPage = #IsEnvironmentalPage# IsEnvironmentalPage = null IsSecuritiesPage = #IsSecuritiesPage# IsSecuritiesPage = null IsTitlePage = #IsTitlePage# IsTitlePage = null IsWillsEstatePage = #IsWillsEstatePage# IsWillsEstatePage = null IsPlaintiffPage = #IsPlaintiffPage# IsPlaintiffPage = null IsRealEstatePage = #IsRealEstatePage# IsRealEstatePage = null IsFinancialInsPage = #IsFinancialInsPage# IsFinancialInsPage = null IsIntellectPropPage = #IsIntellectPropPage# IsIntellectPropPage = null IsCorporatePage = #IsCorporatePage# IsCorporatePage = null IsFirmMergedWithOtherFirm = #IsFirmMergedWithOtherFirm# IsFirmMergedWithOtherFirm = null IsAopPage = #IsAopPage# IsAopPage = null IsPracticePage = #IsPracticePage# IsPracticePage = null IsFirmPage = #IsFirmPage# IsFirmPage = null IsCoveragePage = #IsCoveragePage# IsCoveragePage = null IsApplIntToFinanAssests = #IsApplIntToFinanAssests# IsApplIntToFinanAssests = null IsPolicyIncludeLateralHireCov = #IsPolicyIncludeLateralHireCov# IsPolicyIncludeLateralHireCov = null IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToInvestment = #IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToInvestment# IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToInvestment = null IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToMoney = #IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToMoney# IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToMoney = null IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToInvClient = #IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToInvClient# IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToInvClient = null BackupAttorneyAddress2 = #BackupAttorneyAddress2# BackupAttorneyAddress2 = null CommentsByInsured = #CommentsByInsured# CommentsByInsured = null CommentsByAgent = #CommentsByAgent# CommentsByAgent = null IsLoginMailSent = #IsLoginMailSent# IsLoginMailSent = null IsMailSent = #IsMailSent# IsMailSent = null IsRegistrationPage = #IsRegistrationPage# IsRegistrationPage = null IsRetreivalMailSent = #IsRetreivalMailSent# IsRetreivalMailSent = null IsQuickQuotePage = #IsQuickQuotePage# IsQuickQuotePage = null IsClaimInLastFiveYears = #IsClaimInLastFiveYears# IsClaimInLastFiveYears = null IsReceiveNewsLetter = #IsReceiveNewsLetter# IsReceiveNewsLetter = null IsFirmReferred = #IsFirmReferred# IsFirmReferred = null QuoteEffectiveDate = #QuoteEffectiveDate# QuoteEffectiveDate = null QuoteExpiryDate = #QuoteExpiryDate# QuoteExpiryDate = null Comment = #Comment# Comment = null ModifierComment = #ModifierComment# ModifierComment = null CreatedBy = #CreatedBy# CreatedBy = null IsQuoteViewedByInsured = #IsQuoteViewedByInsured# IsQuoteViewedByInsured = null AcceptanceDate = #AcceptanceDate# AcceptanceDate = null QuoteSentDate = #QuoteSentDate# QuoteSentDate = null IsTaxCalculation = #IsTaxCalculation# IsTaxCalculation = null IsViewed = #IsViewed# IsViewed = null QuoteComment = #QuoteComment# QuoteComment = null IsQuickQuoteMailSent = #IsQuickQuoteMailSent# IsQuickQuoteMailSent = null IsLicenseNumberUpdated = #IsLicenseNumberUpdated# IsLicenseNumberUpdated = null IssuedDate = #IssuedDate# IssuedDate = null IsRealEstateResidentialPage = #IsRealEstateResidentialPage# IsRealEstateResidentialPage = null IsRealEstateCommercialPage = #IsRealEstateCommercialPage# IsRealEstateCommercialPage = null IsApplFirmWithDifferentLegalName = #IsApplFirmWithDifferentLegalName# IsApplFirmWithDifferentLegalName = null ApplLegalNameAddressDesc = #ApplLegalNameAddressDesc# ApplLegalNameAddressDesc = null IsFirmEquityInterestInTitleInsurance = #IsFirmEquityInterestInTitleInsurance# IsFirmEquityInterestInTitleInsurance = null MarketingId = #MarketingId# MarketingId = null IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceDesc = #IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceDesc# IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceDesc = null IsAttorneyAddedDeleted = #IsAttorneyAddedDeleted# IsAttorneyAddedDeleted = null IsFirmProvidedLegalService = #IsFirmProvidedLegalService# IsFirmProvidedLegalService = null IsRenewFirmPage = #IsRenewFirmPage# IsRenewFirmPage = null IsFirmProvideInvestmentAdvice = #IsFirmProvideInvestmentAdvice# IsFirmProvideInvestmentAdvice = null ClientNameFirstLargestRevenueClient = #ClientNameFirstLargestRevenueClient# ClientNameFirstLargestRevenueClient = null Is9010Policy = #Is9010Policy# Is9010Policy = null IsSpecialIssuance = #IsSpecialIssuance# IsSpecialIssuance = null GrossFeesPaidRenew = #GrossFeesPaidRenew# GrossFeesPaidRenew = null DateRenderedFirstLargestRevenueClient = #DateRenderedFirstLargestRevenueClient# DateRenderedFirstLargestRevenueClient = null ClientNameSecondLargestRevenueClient = #ClientNameSecondLargestRevenueClient# ClientNameSecondLargestRevenueClient = null IsRenewalReview = #IsRenewalReview# IsRenewalReview = null SpecialIssuanceComments = #SpecialIssuanceComments# SpecialIssuanceComments = null ipfsQuoteNumber = #ipfsQuoteNumber# ipfsQuoteNumber = null RenewalReviewComments = #RenewalReviewComments# RenewalReviewComments = null DateRenderedSecondLargestRevenueClient = #DateRenderedSecondLargestRevenueClient# DateRenderedSecondLargestRevenueClient = null IsOffRiskLetterUploaded = #IsOffRiskLetterUploaded# IsOffRiskLetterUploaded = null isPricingApproved = #isPricingApproved# isPricingApproved = null isComingFromUWFlow = #isComingFromUWFlow# isComingFromUWFlow = null UnderwriterComment = #UnderwriterComment# UnderwriterComment = null FollowUnderwriterFlow = #FollowUnderwriterFlow# FollowUnderwriterFlow = null ReferralCountHistory = #ReferralCountHistory# ReferralCountHistory = null NumberOfLawyers = #NumberOfLawyers# NumberOfLawyers = null NumberOfLawyers500 = #NumberOfLawyers500# NumberOfLawyers500 = null NumberOfLawyers1000 = #NumberOfLawyers1000# NumberOfLawyers1000 = null IsIndicationPage = #IsIndicationPage# IsIndicationPage = null IsFormDocumentSigned = #IsFormDocumentSigned# IsFormDocumentSigned = null SubProducerComment = #SubProducerComment# SubProducerComment = null IsThankYouEmailSend = #IsThankYouEmailSend# IsThankYouEmailSend = null QQRMLink = #QQRMLink# QQRMLink = null isFirmCoverageForPreceedorFirmsDescription = #isFirmCoverageForPreceedorFirmsDescription# isFirmCoverageForPreceedorFirmsDescription = null FirmInvestmentAdviceDesc = #FirmInvestmentAdviceDesc# FirmInvestmentAdviceDesc = null isServedAsCEOChairmanPresident = #isServedAsCEOChairmanPresident# isServedAsCEOChairmanPresident = null isPolicyExcludeCoverageDescription = #isPolicyExcludeCoverageDescription# isPolicyExcludeCoverageDescription = null isPolicyExcludeCoverage = #isPolicyExcludeCoverage# isPolicyExcludeCoverage = null disbursementTransaction = #disbursementTransaction# disbursementTransaction = null peopleToDisburseFunds = #peopleToDisburseFunds# peopleToDisburseFunds = null instructionsDocumentedReceivingParty = #instructionsDocumentedReceivingParty# instructionsDocumentedReceivingParty = null doucumentedProtocolsAndAuthority = #doucumentedProtocolsAndAuthority# doucumentedProtocolsAndAuthority = null IsIndicationMailSent = #IsIndicationMailSent# IsIndicationMailSent = null IsCantSeeQuote = #IsCantSeeQuote# IsCantSeeQuote = null IsAOPChange = #IsAOPChange# IsAOPChange = null ZohoAccountID = #ZohoAccountID# ZohoAccountID = null VersionKey = #VersionKey# VersionKey = null isNewApp = #isNewApp# isNewApp = null hasAnyFirmPersonnelReported = #hasAnyFirmPersonnelReported# hasAnyFirmPersonnelReported = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from FirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select ContactPerson, ContactPhone, IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns, IsPolicyExcludesCoverage, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsQuickQuoteByEmail, IsAnAgentCall, ContactPhoneExt, IsBasicPage, IsGeneralPage, IsEntertainmentPage, IsClientTerminated, FirstReviewUserID, VersionSequence, LicenseNumber, IsQuotePage, YearOfFirmEstablished, IsFirmPracticeInOtherState, IsFirmHaveClientInEntertainmentInd, IsFirmInvolvedInClassActionCase, IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToSecurity, IsFirmHaveClientMoreThan25PercentOfBilling, PercentFromFirstLargestRevenueClient, PercentFromSecondLargestRevenueClient, ServicesRenderedFirstLargestRevenueClient, ServicesRenderedSecondLargestRevenueClient, IsFirmHaveLawyersLiabilityInsurance, PolicyExcludeCoverageForAffiliatesDesc, IsFirmCoverageForPreceedorFirms, IsFirmHaveEquityIntGrtThan10, IsFirmPersServedAsOfficerInJointVenture, IsApplicantProvidesLegalServices, ApplicantProvidesLegalServicesDesc, IsAttorneyNotCoveredByProfLiability, IsAppOfficeSharedWithAttorney, TotalNumOfNonAttorneyStaff, IsFirmHaveIndepDockets, IsFirmRequireEngagementLetter, IsNonEngagementLetterIssueToFirm, IsPolicyProhibitAttorneyWithInvestment, IsEmplRelativeToConfInfomation, PercentofApplAcctRcbl, IsApplInitiatedLawsuitForFirm, IsAttorneyDeclineForProfLiability, AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityDates, AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityReasons, IsIndependentContractor, IsFirmHaveBackupAttorney, PerOfGrossBillingsUnderContract, BackupAttorneyName, BackupAttorneyAddress, BackupAttorneyPhoneNumber, IsFirmHaveProcForFormersClients, IsLawyerProfLiabClaimAgntAppl, IsPersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvest, IsAnyActOmmBecomeClaimAgntFirm, ApplicantName, IsApplRestWithManagement, ApplRestWithManagementDesc, PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDate, PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDetails, IsTaxPage, IsEnvironmentalPage, IsSecuritiesPage, IsTitlePage, IsWillsEstatePage, IsPlaintiffPage, IsRealEstatePage, IsFinancialInsPage, IsIntellectPropPage, IsCorporatePage, IsFirmMergedWithOtherFirm, IsAopPage, IsPracticePage, IsFirmPage, IsCoveragePage, IsApplIntToFinanAssests, QuoteExpiryDate, Comment, ModifierComment, CreatedBy, IsQuoteViewedByInsured, AcceptanceDate, QuoteSentDate, IsTaxCalculation, IsViewed, QuoteComment, IsQuickQuoteMailSent, IsLicenseNumberUpdated, IssuedDate, IsRealEstateResidentialPage, IsRealEstateCommercialPage, IsApplFirmWithDifferentLegalName, ApplLegalNameAddressDesc, IsFirmEquityInterestInTitleInsurance, MarketingId, IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceDesc, IsAttorneyAddedDeleted, IsFirmProvidedLegalService, IsRenewFirmPage, IsFirmProvideInvestmentAdvice, ClientNameFirstLargestRevenueClient, Is9010Policy, IsSpecialIssuance, GrossFeesPaidRenew, DateRenderedFirstLargestRevenueClient, ClientNameSecondLargestRevenueClient, IsRenewalReview, SpecialIssuanceComments, ipfsQuoteNumber, RenewalReviewComments, DateRenderedSecondLargestRevenueClient, IsOffRiskLetterUploaded, isPricingApproved, isComingFromUWFlow, UnderwriterComment, FollowUnderwriterFlow, ReferralCountHistory, NumberOfLawyers, NumberOfLawyers500, NumberOfLawyers1000, IsIndicationPage, IsFormDocumentSigned, SubProducerComment, IsThankYouEmailSend, QQRMLink, isFirmCoverageForPreceedorFirmsDescription, FirmInvestmentAdviceDesc, isServedAsCEOChairmanPresident, isPolicyExcludeCoverageDescription, isPolicyExcludeCoverage, disbursementTransaction, peopleToDisburseFunds, instructionsDocumentedReceivingParty, doucumentedProtocolsAndAuthority, IsIndicationMailSent, IsCantSeeQuote, IsAOPChange, ZohoAccountID, VersionKey, isNewApp, hasAnyFirmPersonnelReported, PolicyKey from FirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, ContactPerson, ContactPhone, IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns, IsPolicyExcludesCoverage, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsQuickQuoteByEmail, IsAnAgentCall,
